basics.name: Somesh Dwivedi
basics.title: Technology Analyst | MERN Stack Developer
basics.summary: I’m a passionate MERN Stack Developer with 2+ years of hands-on experience building scalable, user-friendly, and high-performance web applications. Skilled in MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, and Node.js, I thrive on transforming complex business requirements into seamless digital solutions.
highlights: Successfully delivered multiple projects from concept to deployment.
Experienced in REST APIs, authentication, cloud deployment, and Git-based workflows.
Strong problem-solving skills with a focus on performance and scalability.

experience.description: As a MERN Stack Developer at Infosys, I have been responsible for designing, developing, and deploying scalable web applications that enhance client business processes and improve user experiences.
bullets: Developed end-to-end web applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, and Node.js.
Built responsive and dynamic UIs with React, ensuring cross-browser compatibility and performance optimization.
Designed and implemented RESTful APIs for seamless integration with frontend applications and third-party services.
Optimized backend performance, improving API response time and overall application scalability.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams (designers, QA, and business analysts) in an Agile/Scrum environment to deliver features on time.
Worked with Git and cloud deployment (AWS) to streamline development and release cycles.
Ensured code quality and best practices through peer code reviews, testing, and documentation.

experience.company: Allsoft Solutions and services Private Limited
bullets: Played a crucial role in designing, developing and managing Java-based applications and software.

achievements.title: Scalable Solutions
achievements.description: Contributed to scalable solutions that now support thousands of users daily.

achievements.title: Project Delivery
achievements.description: Successfully delivered multiple projects that improved business efficiency and client satisfaction.

achievements.title: Performance Optimization
achievements.description: Optimized backend performance, improving API response time and overall application scalability.

projects.title: DevTinder App
projects.description: A full-stack MERN application enabling developers to discover and connect with nearby developers based on location. Implemented secure user authentication, RESTful APIs, Tinder-style swipe functionality, and real-time updates.

projects.title: Food Delivery App
projects.description: A responsive food ordering web application with real-time cart state updates. Built reusable modular UI components and implemented intuitive UX patterns for smooth navigation.

education.institution: Chandigarh Group of Colleges, Landran, Punjab
education.degree: Bachelor of Technology - BTech, java IOT and android
